name: Faeth Therapeutics, Inc.
business: The company is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on improving outcomes for cancer patients through multi-node inhibition of critical oncogenic pathways. Its lead program is PIKTOR, an oral multi-node inhibitor of the PI3K/AKT/mTOR pathway, in development for endometrial and breast cancer. The company has not generated any product revenue and expects to continue incurring losses.

exposures.sentence: Following the acquisition, our lead program is PIKTOR, an oral multi-node inhibitor of the PI3K/AKT/mTOR pathway in development for endometrial and breast cancer.

catalysts.event: Topline data from Phase 2 trial of PIKTOR in advanced endometrial cancer (Study FTH-PIK-201)
catalysts.sentence: PIKTOR is currently being evaluated in an ongoing Phase 2 trial in second-line advanced endometrial cancer (Study FTH-PIK-201), with topline data anticipated by year-end 2026

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1b trial of PIKTOR in HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer (Study FTH-PIK-101)
catalysts.sentence: we intend to initiate a Phase 1b trial in HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer (Study FTH-PIK-101) by the first half of 2026
